creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
Still happening:

https://ci.freebsd.org/job/FreeBSD-head-mips64-build/14732/console
https://ci.freebsd.org/job/FreeBSD-head-powerpc64-build/16971/console

00:27:26.087 ld: error: cannot open /usr/obj/usr/src/mips.mips64/obj-lib32/tmp/usr/lib32/libgcc_s.so: No such file or directory

The message is different than the title of this ticket (ld: error: unable to find library -lgcc_s) but it also occurred before base r365889.
